zh.lifeSummary: Alice Peverel於1135年3月1日出生在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。她於大約1154年與Ralph Bassett I在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1166年6月6日在她的家鄉享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: Peverel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Peverel was born on 1 March 1135, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England. She married Ralph Bassett I about 1154, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 6 June 1166, in her hometown, at the age of 31.

Elle a épousé Ralph Bassett I environ 1154, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. ja.lifeSummary: Alice Peverelは1135年3月1日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた。約1154年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットでRalph Bassett Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1166年6月6日に故郷で31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Peverel(은)는 1135년 3월 1일 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1154년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 Ralph Bassett I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1166년 6월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Peverel родилась 1 марта 1135 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Bassett I около 1154 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 6 июня 1166 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 31 год.
